name: @agent-profile/web
description: Local-first SvelteKit UI for Agent Profile Compiler.

scripts.check: npm run build --workspace @agent-profile/core --if-present && npm run build --workspace @agent-profile/compiler --if-present && npm run build --workspace @agent-profile/doctor --if-present && svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json --no-tsconfig
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @agent-profile/core --if-present && npm run build --workspace @agent-profile/compiler --if-present && npm run build --workspace @agent-profile/doctor --if-present && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.test.json --test src/lib/server/*.test.ts
